response.justification: Bogdan brings 30+ years of hands-on engineering experience and recent AI-agent tooling exposure, which satisfies the tenure requirement. However, the role is a Director-level individual contributor demanding recognized AI expertise, cloud platform strategy, and the ability to advise enterprise customers at an executive level. His current and past positions are staff/senior hands-on engineering roles with no evidence of strategic advisory work, cloud product ownership, or AI leadership at scale. The absence of an advanced degree in an AI-related field and no demonstrated AI products with broad adoption further widen the gap from the preferred profile.
strengths: 30+ years of continuous engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains, far exceeding the 15-year minimum
Active contribution to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework tooling at re:cinq, showing practical engagement with agentic workflows
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective and a history of knowledge-sharing through workshops and conference talks
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in AI or a related field; holds only two Bachelor's degrees, neither AI-focused
AI involvement is limited to hands-on developer tooling rather than strategic product leadership, platform-scale deployment, or externally recognized contributions
No evidence of Director-level responsibilities, enterprise advisory engagements, or cloud platform strategy — the core demands of this Principal Engineer role
